I.3 Indicator evaluation method 
The CMEMS sea level OMIs are derived from the DUACS delayed -time two -
satellite merged altimeter sea level gridded produ cts, in DT -2024 version, 
distributed by the Copernicus C

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document for Ocean Monitoring Indicators (OMIs) of the Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring Service, focusing on sea level anomalies and trends in various regions including the Mediterranean Sea.

product_line.name: OMI_CLIMATE_SL_*_area_averaged_anomalies & OMI_CLIMATE_SL_GLOBA_regional_trends
product_line.region: Global, Baltic Sea, Black Sea, Europe, IBI, Mediterranean Sea, Northwest Shelf
